name: CPersona
description: Persistent character persona memory with FTS5 + vector hybrid search, anti-contamination, and a 24-tool surface. Single SQLite file, zero LLM dependency at the storage layer.

optional_env_vars.name: CPERSONA_DB_PATH
optional_env_vars.description: SQLite database path. Defaults to a relative path; set to an absolute path in production.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_MODE
optional_env_vars.description: Embedding mode (none | http | api). Generic key shared with other Cloto MCP servers. Falls back to CPERSONA_EMBEDDING_MODE for backward compatibility.

optional_env_vars.name: EMBEDDING_HTTP_URL
optional_env_vars.description: HTTP-mode embedding endpoint. Required when EMBEDDING_MODE=http. Falls back to CPERSONA_EMBEDDING_URL.

optional_env_vars.name: CPERSONA_RECALL_MODE
optional_env_vars.description: Recall strategy: 'rrf' (Reciprocal Rank Fusion across FTS / vector / keyword) or 'cascade' (sequential fallback).

optional_env_vars.name: CPERSONA_CONFIDENCE_ENABLED
optional_env_vars.description: Include confidence metadata in recall results.

optional_env_vars.name: CPERSONA_AUTO_CALIBRATE
optional_env_vars.description: Auto-calibrate vector similarity threshold on startup using the null-distribution z-score method.

changelog:
v2.4.19: Session no-persist mode. Adds three tools (pause_persistence / resume_persistence / persistence_status) that turn this server's write tools into no-ops for an opt-in TTL window (default 30 min, max 1 day). While paused, store / archive_episode / update_* / delete_* / lock_* / unlock_memory / update_profile / import_memories / merge_memories / calibrate_threshold return responses with `persisted: false`, `dry_run: true`, and `id: "no-persist"` instead of writing. The MemoryTaskQueue worker drops queued archive_episode / update_profile tasks under no-persist. check_health(fix=true) and deep_check(fix=true) downgrade to fix=False during no-persist and report `repairs_skipped: true`. Read tools (recall, list_*, get_profile, etc.) are unaffected. Module-level state per process; server restart loses the flag. Symmetric with cscheduler 0.2.6 — clients should call pause_persistence on both servers if they want both paused. Tool count: 21 → 24.
v2.4.18: Internal refactor — γ-semantics SQL builder and project_id coercer moved to common/isolation.py (shared with cscheduler 0.2.4). No behavior, schema, or tool-surface change.
v2.4.17: agent_id × project_id two-tier isolation (γ semantics). SCHEMA_VERSION 8→9 adds project_id (TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '') to memories / episodes / profiles / pending_memory_tasks via ALTER TABLE backfill — existing DBs are upgraded in place. Writes accept project_id (defaults to '' = global pool when omitted). Reads apply γ filter (None = no filter, '' = global pool only, 'X' = 'X' ∪ global pool). store dedup (msg_id / content) is now project-scoped.
